footer.tagline: Studio classes, memberships, and member tools — one calm place to plan your practice.

explore.title: Explore
explore.lead: Stories, retreats, and editorial notes from the studio — refreshed each week.

featured.title: The Power of Breath
featured.excerpt: Three rituals our coaches keep returning to — small habits that quietly recentre the day.
featured.imageAlt: Close-up of a calm studio practice

tuscany.title: Spring in Tuscany
tuscany.excerpt: A 5-day reset among the cypress hills — yoga, slow meals, and quiet walks.

protocols.title: Enhanced Protocols
protocols.excerpt: How our reformer flows are evolving for stronger posture and softer recovery.

breath.title: Breath as anchor
breath.excerpt: A short series on breathwork to settle into class — or to begin the day at home.

gift.body: An Ommm gift card opens the studio for someone you love — classes, retreats, and quiet rituals, on their schedule.

hero.subLine1: A space for inner calmness, balance, and mindful
hero.heroImageAlt: Person meditating in a bright minimal studio with an oval opening to the sea

home.weeklyScheduleSubtitle: Join us throughout the week for transformative sessions tailored to your wellness journey.
home.weeklyScheduleDayTabsAria: Choose a day of the week
home.weeklyScheduleDayTabAria: {day}, {count, plural, =0 {no sessions} one {# session} other {# sessions}}
home.classesSubtitle: Carefully curated sessions designed to nurture your physical and mental well-being.

classCards.title: Mindfulness & Breathwork
classCards.body: Techniques to anchor your presence and expand your lung capacity through guided breath.

classCards.title: Balance Work
classCards.body: Focus on core stability and spatial awareness to find steadiness in the center of movement.

classCards.title: Restorative Recovery
classCards.body: Deep relaxation for the nervous system, using props to hold the body in gentle stillness.

classCards.title: Dynamic Movement
classCards.body: Fluid sequences that build heat and strength while maintaining a rhythmic, moving flow.

classCards.title: Flexibility & Lengthening
classCards.body: Targeted stretches designed to release tension and create space within the joints and muscles.

classCards.title: Community Sessions
classCards.body: Group practices that emphasize shared energy, connection, and collective well-being.

coachSlides.name: Jane Doe
coachSlides.bio: Coach info placeholder — replace with your lead teacher bio from the admin panel when ready.

coachSlides.name: Sofia Reed
coachSlides.bio: Coach info placeholder — flows built around steady breath and sustainable alignment.

coachSlides.name: Morgan Lee
coachSlides.bio: Coach info placeholder — strength sessions that stay kind to joints and nervous system.

coachSlides.name: Alex Rivera
coachSlides.bio: Coach info placeholder — slower practices to downshift after busy weeks.

signIn.title: Member area
signIn.body: Log in to see your upcoming classes, waitlists, and studio tools.

dashboard.lead: Your next session, waitlists, and studio notes — in one calm flow.

nextClass.emptyBody: Browse the live schedule and reserve a spot when you are ready.

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.lead: We will notify you when a spot opens.
waitlist.empty: You are not on a waitlist right now.
waitlist.error: Waitlist could not be loaded. Try again shortly.

achievements.title: Milestones
achievements.empty: Keep booking classes to unlock milestones.

explore.title: Studio journal
explore.body: Stories and updates on the public Explore page.

marketing.heroSubtitle: Thoughtful scheduling, memberships, and class booking — a full studio experience on the web.
marketing.featureScheduleBody: See upcoming sessions, capacity, and coaches — book in a few taps when you are signed in.
marketing.featureMembershipsBody: Transparent plans with clear inclusions. Subscribe when Stripe is configured, or manage with the team.
marketing.featureUpdatesBody: Stories, events, and updates in Explore — published from your admin content tools.
marketing.closingBody: Create an account to book, manage memberships, and keep your practice organized.
marketing.storyLead: Ommm is built around clarity, presence, and sustainable practice — online and in the studio.
marketing.storyP1: We believe scheduling and memberships should feel calm, not cluttered. The platform keeps members oriented: what is next, what is included, and how to stay in touch.
marketing.storyP2: Editorial content in Explore can grow with you — replace placeholder copy with your own narrative as the studio evolves.
marketing.coachesPageLead: Meet the people guiding classes at Ommm.
marketing.coachesEmpty: No active coach profiles yet — add coaches from the admin backoffice.
marketing.coachesError: We could not load coaches right now. Please try again shortly.
marketing.coachesModalBioFallback: This coach profile will be updated with more details soon.
marketing.membershipsPageLead: Choose a plan that fits how often you want to practice.
marketing.membershipsEmpty: No plans are published yet. Check back soon or contact the studio.
marketing.membershipsError: We could not load plans. Please try again later.
marketing.membershipsLoginHint: Log in or create an account to subscribe.
marketing.membershipsFaqPauseAnswer: Yes - members can pause from their account when the plan supports it; the studio team can also help from the desk.
marketing.membershipsFaqBillingAnswer: Checkout runs through Stripe when enabled in your environment. You will see successful charges in your account payment history.
marketing.membershipsFaqWaitlistQuestion: What if a class is full?
marketing.membershipsFaqWaitlistAnswer: Join the waitlist from the schedule - we notify you when a spot opens, with a limited time to confirm.
marketing.homeMembershipsLead: Choose a plan and keep your practice steady with clear pricing and benefits.
marketing.homeMembershipFallbackStarterDescription: A gentle beginning with essential studio access.
marketing.homeMembershipFallbackFlowDescription: Our most balanced plan for steady weekly practice.
marketing.homeFeaturesLead: A single flow from discovery to booking — clear on every screen size.
marketing.scheduleLead: Weekly class times and booking — sign in to open the live calendar.
marketing.scheduleP1: Members see real-time availability, coach details, and waitlist options. Create an account to reserve your mat and keep your practice organized.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Send an email broadcast to members (studio admin only). Delivery uses the existing mail pipeline; push notifications are tracked separately in the product roadmap.
notifications.deliveryNote: Reminder delivery is deduplicated per booking; broadcast events are audit-logged.

content.title: Content
content.description: Manage posts via API or extend this table with edit actions.

admin.heading: Workspace & integrations
admin.body: Global studio configuration lives in environment variables and deployment tooling. Contact your engineering team to change API keys, mail transport, or integrations.

coach.heading: Workspace & permissions
coach.body: Detailed roster and attendance tools are available on this dashboard; notify admins if you need permissions updates.

manager.heading: Operational defaults
manager.body: Operational defaults are managed centrally. Reach out to studio admins for billing, integrations, or policy changes.

newClass.label: New class announcement
newClass.subject: New class is now available
newClass.body:
Hello from Ommm,

We have added a new class to this week's schedule. Check your app to reserve your spot.

See you at the studio,
Ommm Team

policyReminder.label: Policy reminder
policyReminder.subject: Reminder: booking and cancellation policy
policyReminder.body:
Hello from Ommm,

This is a friendly reminder to review your booking and cancellation timings before your next session.

Thank you,
Ommm Team

waitlistOffer.label: Waitlist opening
waitlistOffer.subject: A spot just opened for your class
waitlistOffer.body:
Hello from Ommm,

A waitlist spot has just opened up. If you are still interested, please confirm your booking as soon as possible.

Regards,
Ommm Team
